title: Read File
name: read_file
description: Read a file's content. Returns an error JSON if the file does not exist, is binary, or is too large. For large files, use offset and limit to read a specific range.

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file you want to read.

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-based). Optional.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read. Optional.

author: admin
